{{Infobox concept
| name = Jade
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

''See also: [[Jade Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Jade represents a significant stage of [[advancement]] for [[sacred artists]], serving as the threshold between lower levels like [[Copper]] and [[Iron]] and the superior [[Gold stage]]. Achieving Jade involves a fundamental transformation of the physical body and requires the practitioner to form a spiral within their core. This specialized internal structure serves several purposes: it increases receptivity to spiritual forces, enhances [[madra]] control and recovery, and condenses the quality of the artist's [[madra]]. The spinning motion within the core also creates a suction force capable of containing a [[Remnant]], which is necessary for transitioning to [[Gold]]. At this level, an artist's capabilities expand significantly. While lower stages focus on seeing [[aura]] or forging the body, Jade artists gain the ability to use their [[spirit]] for deep sensing and perception. This [[Spiritual sight{{!}}spiritual sight]] allows them to sense things beyond normal vision or hearing, though they cannot necessarily determine another person's exact level of [[advancement]] without witnessing their techniques. In social and clan hierarchies, Jade practitioners hold notable status; for example, they often lead combat ranks and wear distinctive badges or jewelry to display their rank. While highly powerful—with experts from specialized Schools being compared to clan Patriarchs—they remain distinct from [[Gold-level]] artists, who possess a qualitative leap in power through the [[binding]] of [[Remnants]].}}

== Unsouled ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">7</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|Advancing to [[Jade]] remakes the body.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c2">''Unsouled'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Jade]] is a stage of [[advancement]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c14">''Unsouled'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Jade]] is a stage or rank within the school's hierarchy.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c16">''Unsouled'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|A battle between [[Jades]] is a significant level of combat.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c17">''Unsouled'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Gold]] is a qualitative leap beyond [[Jade]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Jade]] is battle-ready.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c18">''Unsouled'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Jade]] is a stage that can be reached from [[Foundation]] using two and a half pills.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20">''Unsouled'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Soulsmith ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|At the [[Jade stage]], one can use their [[spirit]] to sense.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c2">''Soulsmith'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Jade]] is a stage of [[advancement]] for [[sacred artists]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c7">''Soulsmith'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|In [[Sacred Valley]], people at the [[Jade stage]] can use their [[spirit]] to sense things.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c13">''Soulsmith'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Jade]] is a stage of [[advancement]] above [[Iron]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c17">''Soulsmith'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Blackflame ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|A [[Jade]] would have sensed [[Fisher Gesha{{!}}Gesha]]'s approach.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c1">''Blackflame'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jade]] is capable of catching a [[Remnant]]'s approach.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jade]] is a place where the [[Jai Patriarch{{!}}Patriarch]] of the [[Wei clan]] is located.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c10">''Blackflame'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The character intends to exchange his [[Iron{{!}}iron]] for [[Jade{{!}}jade]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] has raised his [[pure core]] to [[Jade]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c14">''Blackflame'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Skysworn ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon]] has developed an extra sense for perception after growing to [[Jade]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c1">''Skysworn'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Full-body [[Enforcement]] can be sensed by anyone [[Jade]] or higher.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c4">''Uncrowned'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Jades]] are individuals in [[Sacred Valley]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c1">''Wintersteel'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Jades]] are a group of people who use techniques and can be trained as [[Enforcers]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c1" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">11</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Jade]] is a stage of power or growth that people in [[Sacred Valley]] are being suppressed at.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c4">''Bloodline'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[old woman]] was a [[Jade]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6">''Bloodline'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Jade]] is a rank or stage that [[Orthos]] and [[Kelsa]] currently hold.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c7">''Bloodline'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] threw a full-grown [[Jade]] in his hand.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Jade]] is a rank or stage held by some guards of the [[Fallen Leaf School]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9">''Bloodline'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|A [[Jade]] is able to sense [[Lindon]]'s power.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c11">''Bloodline'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Spiritual pressure]] can be used on those under [[Jade]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Heaven's Glory]] group includes half as many [[Jades]] as [[Irons]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c12">''Bloodline'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Jade]] refers to a level of [[spiritual perception]] or rank.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c13">''Bloodline'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Eithan]] is little better than a genuine [[Jade]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Jai Chen]] was still [[Jade]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c21">''Bloodline'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Without his [[veil]], [[Lindon]] might be perceived as a [[Jade]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c4">''Reaper'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Advancing to [[Jade]] would fix problems caused by the [[Remnant]]'s eyes.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5">''Reaper'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Wei Shi Jaran{{!}}Jaran]] advanced to [[Jade]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6">''Waybound'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Jade]] is a level of power or stage in [[Sacred Valley]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c32">''Waybound'', chapter 32</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Jades]] are individuals who can prostrate themselves.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c35">''Waybound'', chapter 35</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|“You’re Jade too, for now,” she pointed out.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c7" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
